character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: A doctor with powder as white as snow and bright, black eyes. Confronted the pirate captain about drinking rum, asserting his role as a magistrate.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: A pirate with a cut on one cheek, known for his drinking and singing. Confronted Dr. Livesey, threatening him with a knife, but was subdued by the doctor's threat of legal action.

character_dossiers.name: Black Dog
character_dossiers.biography: A pale, tallowy man missing two fingers of the left hand. Interacted with the pirate captain, appearing nervous and fearful during their conversation.

character_dossiers.name: old Taylor
character_dossiers.biography: A gardener who discussed a new cure for rheumatics with Dr. Livesey.
